_comment: Verify fixture for the select_best Run Code node. This is the `inputs` dict passed to main(): the single self-describing `results` array the sweep Map emits (one {item, index, model, metrics} record per trial). Numbers are the REAL local GPU run (scripts/run_sweep_local.py, RTX 3060, 40 epochs) recorded in runs/sweep_summary.json — so verifying doubles as a correctness check: best must resolve to s-640.
